Wiki / Tips & strategy

Tips & strategy

Practical advice for every stage of your empire — what to prioritize early, how to scale through the mid game, and how to optimize once the numbers get huge.

First hour

Early game (Levels 1–8)

  • Blend, then reinvest. Click to blend and immediately spend on the next flavor and your first Mix Speed / Marketing levels.
  • Grab speed early. Faster blends mean more shakes per minute — and more XP — so Mix Speed pays off fast.
  • Turn on Auto Blend (top-left button) so you keep earning while you read menus or step away.
  • Unlock employees at Level 5. The moment passive income exists, your growth stops depending on your clicking hand.
  • Open the Research Lab at Level 6 and put early XP into Yield Boost and Blend Optimization.

Watch the $/s readout (enable it in Settings). When choosing a purchase, prefer whatever raises $/s the most for the cash.

Scaling up

Mid game (Levels 8–15)

  • Buy the special upgrades as they unlock at Level 8: Extra Blender, Flavor Slots, Speed Blending, and Double Shot are all force multipliers.
  • Expand flavor slots to 5 so you can satisfy multiple combos at once.
  • Take contracts (Level 8+). They pay a multiple of your income rate — line up a power-up to smash the bigger ones.
  • Manage wages at Level 10. If your rating is healthy, trimming wages a little boosts net profit; if reviews dip, pay up.
  • Train your most numerous employees first — staff training adds +20% per level to that type.

Keep a combo's flavors loaded at all times. With 5 slots you can often run a 2-flavor and a 3-flavor combo together for stacked bonuses.

The big numbers

Late game (Level 15+)

  • Go global. Countries multiply all income. Buy breadth (many cheap ones) and depth (the big ×8.5–×120 nations) — they combine.
  • Build locations for huge passive income, and add the high-value extensions (delivery, storefront) to your best sites.
  • Prioritize global-multiplier upgrades (Recipe Development, Social-Media Buzz, Master Mixologist) — a flat global boost beats a niche one once your base is large.
  • Finish research tracks. Combo Mastery, Global Outreach, and Catering Expertise pay off the most at scale.
  • Chase Legendary achievements — several grant enormous income buffs.
Optimization

Squeezing out more

Special blends

Get Golden Touch early (×5 golden chance) and stack Special Batches / Golden Formula research. More specials means more bonus cash and faster Special-Outcome achievements.

Power-up timing

Save power-ups for big contracts, VIP requests, or a featured-combo window. Buffs stack, so chaining Lucky Batch (×5) with another can produce a massive spike.

Spend smart

Stack Bulk Purchasing + Bulk Procurement for cheaper shops, Cost Reduction for upgrades, and Hiring Pipeline for staff. Discounts compound across a long run.

Keep reviews high

Fair wages, fast blends, lots of flavors, and more locations all lift your customer rating — which unlocks rating achievements and avoids reputation setbacks.

Quality of life

Don't forget

  • Claim your goals — 5 daily + 3 hourly. Enable Auto-Claim so you never miss a buff.
  • Export a backup save before clearing browser data or switching devices.
  • Seasonal flavors are permanent once unlocked — log in during each event window to bank them forever.
  • Tune the UI — scale, number format, and reduce-motion options make long sessions comfortable.
